title: eremophila dielsiana
intro: Eremophila dielsiana, also known as the 'Dusky Emu Bush', is a flowering plant native to Western Australia, belonging to the family Scrophulariaceae. It has been traditionally used by Indigenous Australians for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties. The plant is believed to provide health benefits such as reducing inflammation, relieving colds and sore throats, and aiding in wound healing. Eremophila dielsiana is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused in oil to utilize its medicinal properties.
